# atlassian_jira_custom_field (Data Source)

Use this data source to look up a Jira Cloud custom field by name.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "atlassian_jira_custom_field" "example" {
  name = "Story Points"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the custom field to look up.

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) The description of the custom field.
- `id` (String) The ID of the custom field (e.g. customfield_10100).
- `searcher_key` (String) The searcher key for the custom field.
- `type` (String) The type of the custom field.
